leadText: Marmalade (Japanese: マーマレード Marmalade) is a type of ingredient introduced in Generation IX.

sections.title: Effect
sections.text: Effect [ edit | edit source ] It can be used as an ingredient in making a sandwich .

sections.title: Description
sections.text: Description [ edit | edit source ] Games Description S V A condiment with sour and bitter notes. It's surprisingly useful, as it makes a nice counterpoint to oilier foods.
